name: Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, and peanut butter in a 2-Quart bowl.
2. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until softened, about 2 to 2 1/2 minutes.
3. Stir until melted and smooth. Mix in marshmallows and peanuts until evenly coated.
4. Spread mixture in a buttered square baking pan, 8 x 8 x 2-inches.
5. Refrigerate until firm, at least 1 hour.
6. Cut into bars, 2 x 1-inch. Makes 32 bars.
7. Grease the bottom only of the square baking dish, 8 x 8 x 2-inches.
8. Mix brown sugar, margarine, egg, and vanilla in a bowl.
9. Stir in flour, oats, baking powder, and salt until combined.
10. Spread evenly in the baking dish.
11. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and nuts.
12. Microwave uncovered on high (100%), 4 minutes; turn off and stir.
